calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs
Off Calendar Apr-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFFS AHMAD HAKIMJAVADI AND BEHJAT HAKIMJAVADI'S Motion To Tax Costs is Granted as to $187 in attachment expenses and $374.20 in models, blowups and photocopies and denied as to all other costs sought to be taxed. Photocopying charges other than for trial exhibits are not recoverable (1033.5(b)(3)). No explanation is provided for the attachment expenses. The deposition and witness costs were reasonably necessary and are recoverable. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs
Off Calendar Apr-02-2012 Continued To Apr-06-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. LISA A. TAPPER OF YARON & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 658-2929 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. TATIANA OSEROFF OF GORDON & REES, TEL. NO. (619) 696-6700 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT GETINGE USA BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS AHMAD HAKIMJAVADI and BEHJAT HAKIMJAVADI'S Motion To Tax Costs is continued to April 6, 2012. The moving party provided courtesy copies of the moving papers as required by Local Rule 2.6B at the hearing. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)
